2603.14838.title: The Impact of Ideological Discourses in RAG: A Case Study with COVID-19 Treatments
2603.14838.paper_summary: This paper studies the impact of retrieved ideological texts on the outputs of large language models (LLMs). While interest in understanding ideology in LLMs has recently increased, little attention has been given to this issue in the context of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). To fill this gap, we design an external knowledge source based on ideological loaded texts about COVID-19 treatments. Our corpus is based on 1,117 academic articles representing discourses about controversial and endorsed treatments for the disease. We propose a corpus linguistics framework, based on Lexical Multidimensional Analysis (LMDA), to identify the ideologies within the corpus. LLMs are tasked to answer questions derived from three identified ideological dimensions, and two types of contextual prompts are adopted: the first comprises the user question and ideological texts; and the second contains the question, ideological texts, and LMDA descriptions. Ideological alignment between reference ideological texts and LLMs' responses is assessed using cosine similarity for lexical and semantic representations. Results demonstrate that LLMs' responses based on ideological retrieved texts are more aligned with the ideology encountered in the external knowledge, with the enhanced prompt further influencing LLMs' outputs. Our findings highlight the importance of identifying ideological discourses within the RAG framework in order to mitigate not just unintended ideological bias, but also the risks of malicious manipulation of such models.
2603.14838.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文研究了檢索到的意識形態文本對大型語言模型（LLMs）輸出的影響。雖然最近對理解LLMs中的意識形態的興趣有所增加，但在檢索增強生成（RAG）的背景下，對此問題的關注卻很少。為了填補這一空白，我們設計了一個基於有關COVID-19治療的意識形態文本的外部知識來源。我們的語料庫基於1,117篇學術文章，代表了有關該疾病的爭議性和被認可的治療的論述。我們提出了一個基於詞彙多維分析（LMDA）的語料語言學框架，以識別語料庫中的意識形態。LLMs的任務是回答來自三個已識別意識形態維度的問題，並採用兩種類型的上下文提示：第一種包括用戶問題和意識形態文本；第二種包含問題、意識形態文本和LMDA描述。通過餘弦相似度來評估參考意識形態文本與LLMs回應之間的意識形態一致性，針對詞彙和語義表徵。結果表明，基於檢索到的意識形態文本的LLMs回應與外部知識中遇到的意識形態更為一致，增強的提示進一步影響了LLMs的輸出。我們的研究結果突顯了在RAG框架內識別意識形態論述的重要性，以減少不僅是無意的意識形態偏見，還有這些模型惡意操縱的風險。
2603.14838.author: Elmira Salari et.al.
2603.14838.authors: Elmira Salari, Maria Claudia Nunes Delfino, Hazem Amamou, José Victor de Souza, Shruti Kshirsagar, Alan Davoust, Anderson Avila
